title: belongs_to with custom foreign_key
prompt: Build MyApp.Orders.Order which belongs to a customer, but the foreign key column is named `buyer_id` (not the default `customer_id`). Use `belongs_to :customer, MyApp.CRM.Customer, foreign_key: :buyer_id`. Write to lib/my_app/orders/order.ex.
tier_rationale: Single belongs_to with a named option. Easy but tests the foreign_key override.
